title: Ring Runner: Flight of the Sages

notes:
Needs d3dx9, directx9, dotnet40, directmusic, dsound, msxml3, xna40
loads into menu, but crashes when trying to start a game..
title: Ring Runner: Flight of the Sages

notes:
What works: Single player, Multiplayer, Windowed and borderless windowed, Sound effects, Music, Keyboard and mouse controls, Steam Controller
.
.
What does not: Fullscreen, xbox 360 controller
.
.
Must Create 32-bit Wineprefix
WINEPREFIX=/media/remi/Games/Steam\ Linux/steamapps/compatdata/258010/pfx WINEARCH=win32 wineboot
WINEPREFIX=/media/remi/Games/Steam\ Linux/steamapps/compatdata/258010/pfx WINEARCH=win32 winetricks dotnet20
WINEPREFIX=/media/remi/Games/Steam\ Linux/steamapps/compatdata/258010/pfx WINEARCH=win32 winetricks d3dx9 directx9 dotnet40 directmusic dsound msxml3 xna40
mkdir pfx/drive_c/windows/syswow64 # proton crashes if you don't do this
Launch Game from Steam
title: Ring Runner: Flight of the Sages

notes: Installing xna40 and dotnet40 using protontricks worked to get the game window visible and playable (but without sound). Did not have the patience to install packages to add sound.
title: Ring Runner: Flight of the Sages

notes: Worked fine (including sound) after installing xna40 and dotnet40 via protontricks. No additional system package or gdiplus was actually required.
title: Ring Runner: Flight of the Sages
